Final Model for Euro Challenge 2026 - Li: Lithuania Retention Pipeline - Final Eurostat-Baseline Model
This workbook matches the final agreed model logic: EC/Eurostat-style baseline, policy measured as improvement relative to baseline, and family support as a tertiary module.
Policy engine inputs (annual, before scenario scaling)
Immigrant entrants ages 18–34 helped by policy
Returning Lithuanians ages 18–34 helped by policy
Additional parents kept in labor force
Base net retained contributors per year
Average annual wage of retained cohort (€)
Annual public-service cost per added resident (€)
Net annual fiscal benefit per retained contributor (€)
